title: Madame Web
content:
{{Otheruses|Madame Web}} {{Characters |image = Madame Web infobox.jpg |name = Madame Web |real_name = Cassandra Webb |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Madame Web |derivatives = Cassie Webb{{Ref|MW}}
Cass{{Ref|MW}} |organizational = Patient 93603{{Ref|MW}}}} |species = [[Humans|Human]] |gender = Female |title=Paramedic |affiliation = {{Affiliation|NYFD}} (formerly)
[[Boo Crew]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}}
{{Citizenship|PER}} |birthDate = [[1973|May 26, 1973]][[:File:Madame Web birth certificate.jpg|Cassandra Webb's birth certificate]] |status = Alive |movie = ''[[Madame Web (film)|Madame Web]]'' |portrayed_by = [[Dakota Johnson]] |IDno = 93603{{Ref|MW}}}} {{Quote|Whatever the future holds... [[Boo Crew|we]]'ll be ready. And you know the best thing about the future? It hasn't happened yet.|Cassie Webb|Madame Web (film)}} '''Cassandra 'Cassie' Webb''' is a paraplegic blind woman, the daughter of the late [[Constance Webb]] and was previously affiliated with the [[New York City Fire Department]] when she was a paramedic. Unbeknownst to Webb, she was able to be born safe and healthy thanks to [[Las Arañas]] when her mother was murdered and sent up for adoption, causing her to grow up resentful towards her mother and developing a problem forming close bonds with people. After a near-death experience triggered her clairvoyant powers, Webb was forced to use her new abilities to protect [[Julia Cornwall]], [[Mattie Franklin]] and [[Anya Corazón]] from [[Ezekiel Sims]], her mother's murderer. While protecting the three teenagers, Webb tried to avoid any responsibility, but then began to befriend them by connecting with their family problems, so she entrusted her friend, [[Ben Parker]], to take care of them and then traveled to [[Peru]], where she discovered from [[Santiago]] that her mother always sought to save her with the [[Spiders|spiders]] in Peru. Connected to the [[Web of Life]], Webb returned to save the girls and the Parkers from Ezekiel, whom she managed to kill. After saving the girls, she lost her sight and became a paraplegic. This helped control and increase her powers, now known as '''Madame Web'''. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Birth==== Whilst in the womb, Cassandra Webb was diagnosed with myasthenia gravis, an incurable genetic neuromuscular disease. Her mother, [[Constance Webb]], sought to use the healing properties of a species of [[spiders]] native to [[Peru]]. In the final weeks of her pregnancy, Constance Webb traveled to Peru in order to capture a specimen of the spider. Whilst conducting this research, a man named [[Ezekiel Sims]] provided Constance with protection; however, once she had captured one of the native spiders, Sims killed the research team and stole the spider, during which a struggled ensued and Sims accidentally shot Constance. As Sims fled and Constance was left to die, a tribe of spider-people known as "[[Las Arañas]]" descended from the trees and retrieved her dying body. Their leader, [[Santiago]], used the venom from the native spiders in an attempt to preserve the lives of Cassandra and her mother; the spider venom saved and cured her neuromuscular disease, but her mother died in childbirth. At some point, she left Peru and was returned to the United States.{{Ref|MW}} ====Childhood==== Cassandra grew up in the foster system, during which she was placed in a number of foster family programs; according to Cassie, “some of them were worse than others”. Growing up in the foster care system deprived Cassie of stability and security in childhood, and as a result she grew up resenting her [[Constance Webb|mother]]; believing she took unnecessary risks whilst pregnant, that ultimately got her killed. {{Ref|MW}} ===Joining the FDNY=== Cassie qualified as a paramedic, and began working for the [[New York City Fire Department]], where she would meet and befriend her co-worker, [[Ben Parker]], as well as [[O'Neil]].{{Ref|MW}} === Developing Spider-Powers === [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-1374.webp|{{AltFloat}}|left|Cassandra and the letter S]] Cassandra's first display of her spider-powers happens after she falls into a body of water during a paramedic rescue, leading to her drowning and entering a trance like state. She sees and hears multiple things that regard her future before they actually occur in reality. Such as bloody hands (an allusion to Neil dying and her trying to resuscitate him), a blue balloon that pops (an allusion to Mary's baby shower which has blue balloons), The letter S from a Pepsi billboard advertisement (Alluding to her falling in a body of water, in which the same "S" letter appears) and amongst other things.{{Ref|MW}} === Grieving O'Neil === [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-2723.webp|{{AltFloat}}|Cassandra and Anya from a distance of each other]] After witnessing O'Neil's untimely end, this traumatizes Cassandra. She goes to her doctor for a checkup and some consultation about her visions. At home, Cassandra watches ''[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0044008/?ref_=ttqu_rvi_i_1 A Christmas Carol]'' and then receives a voicemail on the telephone from Ben, he says that O'Neil's funeral starts at 2:00 PM in Poughkeepsie and he also says it would benefit both herself and Susan if Cassandra showed up to his funeral. Cassandra goes to a subway station to Poughkeepsie, unbeknownst to her, she's at the same place at the same time as the three girls and walk pass each other and end up being on the same train.{{Ref|MW}} === Call to action === [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-3602.webp|{{AltFloat}}|left|Cassandra and the three girls getting away in taxi after barely escaping with their lives.]] Cassandra has violent visions of the three girls being murdered by a mysterious man. When she's about to exit the train, something catches her eye, she sees the same mysterious man coming going through train cars. In a hurried panic, Cassandra warns Anya, Julia, and Mattie to exit the train or they will die. Cassandra and the 3 girls manage to evade Ezekiel and get away in a stolen taxi. An overwhelmed Cassandra tries to evade the responsibility of safeguarding the three women from their would be killer. But this backfires when all three of eery them say that their parents are absent in their lives. Ultimately forcing her to accept the responsibility.{{Ref|MW}} === Finding out the girls have powers === [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-6600.webp|{{AltFloat}}|Ezekiel revealing to Cassandra that the girls have powers]] Cassandra reaches out to Ezekiel via her mind and questioned why he was so fixated on having these particular girls murdered. He explained how they would be his doom in the future and he didn't want his forseen fate to come true. He then reveals to her that the three girls will eventually develop powers, in which they will use to kill him.{{Ref|MW}} === Traveling to Peru === [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-7858.webp|{{AltFloat}}|left|The resolution between mother and daughter ]] Cassandra breaks the news to the girls that she feels the need to travel to Peru, in order to confront relevations about her past. Cassandra entrusts Ben and Mary to watch over the three girls while she travels to Peru. She encounters a man named [[Santiago]], who tells her about her mother and Ezekiel. Santiago helps her control her clairvoyance and helps her develop new powers she always had but never knew, such as astral projection and astral multiprescene. He also gives her much needed closure for her mother, as she sees that Constance went through "unnecessary risks" just to save her life. {{Ref|MW}} === Defeating Ezekiel === {{Expand}} ''To be added''{{Ref|MW}} ==Personality== {{Quote|You have a winning personality, I think I got yours by mistake.|[[Ben Parker]] to Cassie Webb|Madame Web (film)}} Cassandra can be described as a socially awkward woman, as seen when she unintentionally makes everyone at a baby shower, especially its host [[Mary Parker]], uncomfortable by stating that her mother died in childbirth. After realizing how inopportune what she says is, she tries to redress, albeit very badly, her statement by saying death in childbirth is super rare and what-not. Being an orphan, she's fond over stray animals, particularly this kitten we see her let in her apartment so she can feed the kitten with milk. When we see Cassandra in an overwhelming ordeal (protecting 3 girls, being suspected of kidnapping, having gruesome visions, seeing a man walk on ceilings and take out cops without a sweat), we can presume that due to this, it causes her to display short fused-ness, such as when she quickly gets angry and yells at the girls for not listening what she tells them what to do. But she is very protective, even going to overkill lengths to ensure their safety, most notably when she crashes her stolen vehicle into a diner just to run over Ezekiel. Cassandra is a brave woman; being a paramedic requires her to do so. ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|I can see better than I ever have.|Cassie Webb|Madame Web (film)}} *'''Enhanced Physiology''': In an attempt to cure her of a neuromuscular illness, Cassie was exposed to the venom of a spider native to the [[Amazon Rainforest]] of [[Peru]]. The regenerative properties of the spider's venom healed Cassie; her neuromuscular disease had been cured so she was born in perfect health. [[2003|Many years later]], this caused her to develop a set of incredible, precognitive powers. **'''Prescience''': [[File:1062015-5175176-1280.webp|thumb|250px|Cassandra's first display of power ]]The spiders' venom provides her mind with a sixth sense where she can see glimpses of the future in the [[Web of Life]]. At first, Webb drowned in a river and entered a trance-like state where what is described like a thread of webbing surrounds her, allowing her to view different scenarios to play out before they occur in reality. Once awakening, she replays a moment in the present before snapping back to the present from a vision of the future, such as Ben Parker checking her oxygen levels, which is currently 79, to which she correctly predicts going to 89 and later sensed the death of her paramedics before it came to be. ***'''Clairvoyance''': [[File:4k-madameweb-superheroscreencaps.com-2929.webp|thumb|250px|Anya murdered by Ezekiel in a vision]]Her visions occur whenever danger is present where she can see the clearness of their approaches. However, she wasn't able to control this ability until going to Peru where she trains with the tribesman who taught her to view her past and that she'll be able to see the right path to follow with her mind, which later allows her to sense every outcome of Sims coming after her and her allies that sabotages his plan, as well as becoming blind enhanced her clairvoyance further to perceive foreknowledge of her surroundings completely. **'''Astral Projection''': Cassie's precognitive powers also grant her the ability to project her consciousness out her body and into her visions. This would increase after Cassie became paraplegic. ***'''Astral Multipresence''': During the fight between herself and [[Ezekiel Sims]], Cassie gained the power to project her astral form into multiple places to help Julia, Anya and Mattie simultaneously. She did this by connecting to the Web of Life and using its webs to branch her spirit in multiple locations. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Physician''': Cassie Webb is a trained paramedic. She knows, for example, how to perform {{WPS|CPR}} and passed her knowledge along to [[Anya Corazón]], [[Julia Cornwall]] and [[Mattie Franklin]]. ==Equipment== *'''[[Madame Web Suit]]''': A specialized red tight suit would be created and used by Cassie to mentor the [[Boo Crew]] as Madame Web. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Constance Webb]] † - Mother ===Allies=== *[[New York City Fire Department]] - Former Employers **[[Ben Parker]] - Best Friend and Former Co-Worker **[[O'Neil]] † - Friend and Former Co-Worker *[[New York City Police Department]] - Situational Enemies *[[Cassie Webb's Cat|Cat]] - Pet *[[Boo Crew]] - Friends and Protégés **[[Spider-Woman|Julia Cornwall/Spider-Woman]] **[[Araña|Anya Corazón/Araña]] **[[Spider-Girl|Mattie Franklin/Spider-Girl]] *[[Mary Parker]] *[[Las Arañas]] - Saviors **[[Santiago]] - Temporary Mentor {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ezekiel Sims]] † - Attempted Killer and Indirect Victim *[[Amaria]] - Involuntary Stalker and Indirect Victim {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Cassandra Webb is an elder with clairvoyant, telepathic and precognitive powers, known as Madame Web. She has a neurological affliction that requires her to be on a lift-support system which resembles spider-webs, she also have a connection to the Web of Life and Destiny. With her powers, she began to assist [[Spider-Man]] in many of his adventures until her eminent death where she was replaced by her pupil at the time, '''[[Julia Carpenter]]'''. *Cassie likes Chinese food. ==Behind the Scenes== *Madame Web's astral projection powers are based on, and references, the {{WPS|Marvel Cinematic Universe}} film ''{{WPS|Doctor Strange (2016 film)|Doctor Strange}}''.[https://www.animationmagazine.net/2024/02/spinning-a-web-of-visual-delights-vfx-supe-mike-brazelton-discusses-madame-web/ Spinning a Web of Visual Delights: VFX Supe Mike Brazelton Discusses ''Madame Web''][https://www.artofvfx.com/madame-web-mike-brazelton-production-vfx-supervisor/ ''Madame Web'': Mike Brazelton – Production VFX Supervisor] *[[Holly Dowell]] and [[Amanda Bradley]] were stunt doubles for [[Dakota Johnson]] in the role of Madame Web. ==References== {{Gallery|Madame Web/Gallery}} {{Wq|Madame Web}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Heroes]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:Paramedics]] [[Category:New York City Fire Department Members]] [[Category:Madame Web (film) Characters]] [[es:Cassandra Webb]]
